10585656.title: The Kicksled Choir
10585656.description: Ten-year-old Gabriel dreams of joining the Kicksled Choir, a local caroling group known for raising donations for the refugees. But he faces an unexpected hurdle after he witnesses his father's alarming aggression towards the very people he wants to help.
